programs.title: Talking Point
programs.desc: The Strait of Hormuz is shut - and Singaporeans are feeling it at the pump, at the checkout, and at the airport. Steven Chia traces the fuel crisis from the waterway to your wallet.

programs.title: Insight 2026/2027
programs.desc: Business Process Outsourcing is one of the industries most likely to be disrupted by AI. India and Philippines have the world's largest BPO sectors. Will tech threaten the livelihoods of millions?

programs.title: When Titans Clash S12: China And The Iran War
programs.desc: How is the Iran crisis impacting China's energy policies, its clean energy exports and nuclear power plans? With US approval ratings dropping globally, what does it mean for China-ASEAN, and China-Europe relations?
